Docs siteGitHub
    Preparing search index...
    • @streamd/react
    • DefaultComponents

    Interface DefaultComponents

    Internal component map type — one component per token kind. Used as the return type of createDefaultComponents.

    interface DefaultComponents {
        blockquote: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        list: ComponentType<ListProps>;
        listItem: ComponentType<ListItemProps>;
        heading: ComponentType<HeadingProps>;
        paragraph: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        codeBlock: ComponentType<CodeBlockProps>;
        hr: ComponentType<Record<never, never>>;
        table: ComponentType<TableProps>;
        mathBlock: ComponentType<MathProps>;
        text: ComponentType<{ content: string }>;
        hardbreak: ComponentType<Record<never, never>>;
        codeSpan: ComponentType<CodeSpanProps>;
        em: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        strong: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        strikethrough: ComponentType<BaseProps>;
        link: ComponentType<LinkProps>;
        image: ComponentType<ImageProps>;
        escape: ComponentType<{ content: string }>;
        mathInline: ComponentType<MathProps>;
    }
    • Defined in react/src/components.tsx:35
